The '''Miro asteroid field''' was where the ''[[Stellar Damsel]]'' ship once hid to escape [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] pursuit until its crew could be rescued. The field was infested with [[Mynock/Legends|mynocks]].

==Appearances==
*{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20010315a|text=Damsel in Distress|int=Damsel in Distress}}
